name: BROADWIND, INC.
business: Broadwind, Inc. is a precision manufacturer of structures, equipment and components for power generation, critical infrastructure, and other specialized applications. It operates through three segments: Heavy Fabrications (wind towers, pressure reducing systems), Gearing (gears, gearboxes, repair services), and Industrial Solutions (supply chain solutions, kitting, assembly). The company primarily serves customers in the energy, mining, and infrastructure sectors in the United States.

exposures.sentence: Our most significant presence is within the U.S. wind energy industry where we provide steel towers and repowering adapters primarily to wind turbine manufacturers.

We provide gearing, gearboxes and precision machined components to a broad set of customers in diverse markets including; power generation, onshore and offshore oil and gas (O&G) fracking and drilling, material handling, wind energy, surface and underground mining, steel, infrastructure, marine, defense, and other industrial markets.

We provide gearing, gearboxes and precision machined components to a broad set of customers in diverse markets including; power generation, onshore and offshore oil and gas (O&G) fracking and drilling, material handling, wind energy, surface and underground mining, steel, infrastructure, marine, defense, and other industrial markets.

Our Gearing segment is also AS9100D certified as of August 2024 and has the ability to produce aerospace components. Additionally, our Gearing and Heavy Fabrications segments completed International Traffic in Arms Regulations registrations in 2024 to protect the intellectual property of our defense customers.
We provide supply chain solutions, light fabrication, inventory management, kitting and assembly services, primarily serving the combined cycle natural gas turbine market.

The following table summarizes the key markets served and product offerings of our three segments as of December 31, 2025: Heavy Fabrications ... Products: Solar Inverter Racks, Solar Powered Shelters/Charging Stations
we continue to evaluate the implementation of emerging technologies such as generative artificial intelligence and machine learning into our products and services.

Cybersecurity incidents could disrupt our business and result in the compromise of confidential information and changes in information security and privacy laws, regulations, policies and contractual obligations could adversely affect our business.

catalysts.event: New collective bargaining agreement at Cicero facility
catalysts.sentence: On March 6, 2026, we agreed to a new four-year collective bargaining agreement with the union representing the workforce at our Cicero, Illinois facility replacing a previous agreement.

catalysts.event: Expiration of Neville Island collective bargaining agreement
catalysts.sentence: The collective bargaining agreement with the Neville Island union was renegotiated in November 2022 and is expected to remain in effect through October 2026.
